articles.title: Some Australian Aboriginal stories may remember coastlines that vanished beneath the sea over 10,000 years ago. Researchers think they could be among humanity’s oldest surviving true stories. - Space Daily
articles.description: Around almost the entire Australian coast, Aboriginal communities have told stories of a time when the sea came inland and swallowed country that people had walked on, hunted across and named. Two researchers have argued that some of these stories may be accu…
